page_title: "pdnd_purposes Data Source - PDND"

---

# pdnd_purposes (Data Source)

Lists PDND purposes with optional filters by e-service IDs, title, consumer IDs, and states.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all active purposes for a specific e-service
data "pdnd_purposes" "active" {
  eservice_ids = [pdnd_eservice.example.id]
  states       = ["ACTIVE"]
}

output "active_purpose_count" {
  value = length(data.pdnd_purposes.active.purposes)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `consumer_ids` (List of String) Filter by consumer UUIDs
- `eservice_ids` (List of String) Filter by e-service UUIDs
- `states` (List of String) Filter by purpose states
- `title` (String) Filter by purpose title

### Read-Only

- `purposes` (Attributes List) List of purposes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--purposes))

<a id="nestedatt--purposes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `purposes`

Read-Only:

- `consumer_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `daily_calls` (Number)
- `delegation_id` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `eservice_id` (String)
- `free_of_charge_reason` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_free_of_charge` (Boolean)
- `is_risk_analysis_valid` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
- `suspended_by_consumer` (Boolean)
- `suspended_by_producer` (Boolean)
- `title` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `version_id` (String)
